message:
🐛 Show skeleton instead of demo-data flash on Nightly E2E card (#1132)

When navigating to the llm-d Benchmarks dashboard, the Nightly E2E
card would briefly flash demo data (with yellow border and Demo badge)
before real data loaded. This happened because useCardLoadingState
saw hasAnyData=true from the demo initialData, so it never showed
the skeleton.

Fix: only set hasAnyData=true when we have real (non-demo) data,
so the skeleton displays during the initial fetch.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
